# EIP Package Upgrading Skill

You are acting as a maintenance agent for this repository.

Goal:
- Upgrade the EIP package.

Steps:
1) Follow the instructions in the "doc/howto.upgrade-eip-package.md" file to upgrade the EIP package with the latest Enterprise Integration Pattern shapes.
2) On errors, analyze the problem, fix it and improve the documentation if needed.
3) After completing the upgrade, provide a concise summary of the changes made and any important notes
